name: studymind-ai
description: Adaptive AI-Based Personalized Study Assistant with Peer Collaboration

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.setup: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('./backend/.env')){ fs.copyFileSync('./backend/.env.example','./backend/.env'); console.log('✅ .env file created — open backend/.env and add your GEMINI_API_KEY and MONGODB_URI'); } else { console.log('✅ .env already exists'); }"
